---
id: convert-step-to-gltf
title: "Convert STEP to glTF (simple)"
description: "Upload a STEP file first via the Files API, then convert it to glTF. Returns **202 Accepted** with a task ID."
sidebar_label: "Convert STEP to glTF (simple)"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api/open/bitbybit-cad-cloud-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Convert STEP to glTF (simple)"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/convert/step-to-gltf"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Upload a STEP file first via the Files API, then convert it to glTF. Returns **202 Accepted** with a task ID.

  as={"h2"}
